title: ononis viscosa subsp. viscosa
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. viscosa, commonly known as sticky restharrow, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of sticky restharrow include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
